summary: Comprehensive end-to-end test of Chronos after layout overhaul, advanced search, user profile and avatar/portada upload features. Backend pytest: 18 passed, 2 skipped (only because the user lookup for 'alex' returned 0 results - search works but seed user name differs). Frontend Playwright: all critical flows verified.

minor.issue: Returned 0 users for seed user alex@chronos.com. Likely the user's nombre/usuario doesn't contain the substring 'alex' (handle/nombre may differ). Not a bug in the endpoint itself - regex+accent-insensitive matching works correctly (verified with 'kei', 'roma', 'cesar', 'legado').

action_items: Optional: verify seed user 'alex' nombre/usuario - search test was skipped because that string wasn't found. If intentional that there is no user with 'alex' substring, ignore.
critical_code_review_comments: server.js is ~865 lines and growing - consider splitting into routes/ modules (auth, relatos, search, usuarios) once it exceeds ~1000 lines for maintainability.
JWT_SECRET is committed in /app/backend/.env - acceptable in dev preview but ensure rotation before production.

CORS_ORIGINS='*' with credentials:true is generally accepted by Express CORS but spec-wise browsers will reject wildcard+credentials. Currently works because frontend is same origin via ingress. Pin to REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL host before public release.
The search regex builder properly escapes regex metacharacters before applying accent-insensitive substitutions - good defensive coding.
Profile.js correctly excludes -password field via .select('-password') in /api/usuarios/:id.

success_rate.backend: 100% (18/18 executed; 2 skipped due to seed data, not bug)

test_credentials: keilin@chronos.com / chronos123 (used). Other seeds: alex/maria/legadoepico (also chronos123). Found in /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
seed_data_creation: None created; used existing seed users.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend uses cookie auth (httpOnly chronos_token, sameSite=lax, secure=true). For Python requests, use a session and POST /api/auth/login with {correo,password} - cookies are stored in the session. The /api/buscar endpoint is accent+case insensitive and searches User.nombre/usuario/bio plus Publicacion.titulo/contenido/categoria. Real frontend testids: topbar-user-avatar, profile-create-btn, profile-follow-btn, upload-avatar-btn, upload-portada-btn, search-input, search-dropdown, search-user-{id}, search-relato-{id}. Both archive-sidebar and side-rail have position:sticky confirmed via computed style.
tests_verified: Auth: login success, login invalid (401), /auth/me returns user without password

Search: q=kei matches Keilin user; q=roma matches Roma imperial relato; q=cesar (no accent) matches 'César y el Rubicón' (accent-insensitive verified); empty q returns empty; no-match returns empty; unauthenticated returns 401
Profile: GET /api/usuarios/:id returns estadisticas {totalRelatos, totalSeguidores, totalSiguiendo, esSeguido}; invalid id -> 400; non-existent -> 404
Uploads: POST /api/usuarios/avatar with multipart 'imagen' returns /api/uploads/avatares/... URL and persists on user; POST /api/usuarios/portada works similarly; missing file -> 400
Layout: side-rail at x=0 (LEFT, sticky), archive-sidebar at x=1257 (RIGHT, sticky); 4 center nav items (Para ti, Crónicas, Legados, Documentos) all present
SearchBar dropdown: shows Cronistas (users with avatar+name+handle) and Crónicas (relatos with categoria) sections with mark/highlight on match

Profile page (own): avatar+upload button, portada+upload button, name, @handle, bio, badges (Civilizaciones / Civilizaciones Antiguas), stats (0 Crónicas / 0 Seguidores / 5 Siguiendo - matches spec exactly), Nueva crónica button, tabs (Crónicas+Seguidores), empty state with 'Crear crónica' button
Profile page (other user): shows 'Seguir'/'Siguiendo' button that toggles correctly between the two states (verified click toggle)
